name: West Texas Discount Golf
about: West Texas Discount Golf is a local retail store in Abilene, TX, that also offers golf simulator services for club fitting and practice. The facility provides custom golf club fitting using an in-house golf simulator, targeting both experienced players and beginners. The store carries a wide selection of new and pre-owned golf equipment, including clubs from top brands like Titleist, TaylorMade, Callaway, and Ping, with a focus on affordability and competitive pricing.
why_golfers_like_it: Professional golf club fitting with over 95 years of combined experience
State-of-the-art golf simulator for testing clubs in real-time
Wide selection of new and pre-owned clubs at competitive prices
Knowledgeable staff to assist with club selection and fitting

simulator_hardware.notes: In-house golf simulator mentioned, but no specific hardware details provided

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: No, you can use the store's clubs for fitting and practice, but bringing your own is recommended for personalized fitting sessions.

faq.question: Can I bring food or drinks?
faq.answer: No, there is no mention of food or drink service on-site. BYOB is not mentioned.

faq.question: How long does an 18-hole simulation take?
faq.answer: The exact time for an 18-hole simulation is not specified, but typical sessions range from 1-2 hours depending on pace and simulator settings.

faq.question: Is the facility kid-friendly?
faq.answer: There is no specific mention of kid-friendly amenities or services, so it is not explicitly marketed as a family venue.
